name: file-task
description: File operation task: read, write, search, or modify files

tasks.detail:
- [ ] What file(s) are being read/written/modified?
- [ ] What is the expected output format?
- [ ] Are there any constraints (file size, encoding)?
Gate: Operation scope clear.

Use the appropriate tool:
- [ ] read_file(path) — read entire file
- [ ] read_lines(path, start, end) — read specific lines
- [ ] write_file(path, content) — create/overwrite file
- [ ] replace_in_file(path, old, new) — surgical edit
- [ ] grep_file(pattern, path) — search within files
- [ ] find_files(pattern, path) — find files by glob
Gate: File operation completed.

- [ ] For writes: verify file exists with expected content
- [ ] For reads: content captured correctly
- [ ] For edits: old text replaced, no unintended changes
Gate: Output validated.

- [ ] Final Answer: <what was done, result>
- [ ] Include file paths and key findings
- [ ] Note any warnings or issues
Gate: Clear, actionable response returned.
